dialogue.text: Rin woke up to the sound of her alarm clock.
It seem that she need to prepare to travel to another planet today.

dialogue.speaker: Rin
dialogue.text: It morning already? I really wanna sleep a little bit more.

dialogue.speaker: Rin
dialogue.text: Let prepare myself for the trip then. Can't let {player} wait for me.

dialogue.speaker: Rin
dialogue.text: This suppose to be where {player} live. But I don't really see him anywhere

dialogue.speaker: Rin
dialogue.text: Where can he be? I thought he said he will be waiting for me here.

dialogue.speaker: {player}
dialogue.text: Sorry for making you wait! I forgot to set up the alarm and I woke up late. I was rushing to get ready and I just got here.
